requirement_topic.en: Radio Type Certification — Giteki Mark (MIC / TELEC, Japan Radio Law)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电型式认证——技适标志（总务省 / TELEC，日本无线电法）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電型式認證——技適標誌（總務省 / TELEC，日本電波法）

summary.en: All radio-frequency equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, BLE, 5G, NFC) imported or sold in Japan must obtain technical conformity certification (技術基準適合証明) or type designation (型式指定) under Article 38-24 of the Radio Law (電波法). These are collectively referred to as 「Giteki」 and are evidenced by the Giteki mark (技適マーク) displayed on the device label. The designated testing and certification body is primarily TELEC (Telecom Engineering Center) under MIC authorisation. Certification is device-specific and must be obtained before importation or sale. Key frequency restrictions apply: the 5 GHz W53 band (5250–5350 MHz) and W56 band (5470–5725 MHz) are restricted from outdoor use in Japan and require Dynamic Frequency Selection (DFS). FCC Certification, CE radio compliance, and China SRRC approval have no mutual recognition with Japan's Giteki system.
summary.zh: 所有进口或在日本销售的射频设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、BLE、5G、NFC）须依据《电波法》第38-24条取得技术基准适合证明或型式指定，统称「技适」，并在设备标签上标注技适标志（技適マーク）。主要指定测试认证机构为总务省授权的TELEC（电信工程中心）。认证针对具体设备，须在进口或销售前取得。主要频率限制：5 GHz W53频段（5250–5350 MHz）和W56频段（5470–5725 MHz）在日本禁止户外使用，且须具备动态频率选择（DFS）功能。FCC认证、CE无线电合规及中国SRRC认证与日本技适体系无互认协议。
summary.zht: 所有進口或在日本銷售的射頻設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、BLE、5G、NFC）須依據《電波法》第38-24條取得技術基準適合證明或型式指定，統稱「技適」，並在設備標籤上標注技適標誌（技適マーク）。主要指定測試認證機構為總務省授權的TELEC（電信工程中心）。認證針對具體設備，須在進口或銷售前取得。主要頻率限制：5 GHz W53頻段（5250–5350 MHz）和W56頻段（5470–5725 MHz）在日本禁止戶外使用，且須具備動態頻率選擇（DFS）功能。FCC認證、CE無線電合規及中國SRRC認證與日本技適體系無互認協議。

standards_or_laws: Radio Law of Japan (電波法), Article 38-24 — technical conformity certification for specified radio equipment
Ministerial Ordinance on Technical Regulations Conformity Certification of Specified Radio Equipment (MIC, Japan)
MIC Technical Standards for Radio Equipment — 2.4 GHz (802.11b/g/n/ax) and 5 GHz W52/W53/W56 (802.11a/n/ac/ax)
5 GHz DFS requirements — W53 (5250–5350 MHz) and W56 (5470–5725 MHz) outdoor restriction, Japan Radio Law Enforcement Regulations
TELEC (Telecom Engineering Center) — designated testing and certification body under MIC

summary.en: In China, radio transmitting equipment must obtain SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval administered by MIIT under the Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China (2016 revision). Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices require SRRC approval before sale and must bear the CMIIT ID marking on the product. Networked IoT terminal equipment may additionally require a MIIT network access licence (NAL). SRRC approval is China-domestic and is not recognised by MIC Japan; no bilateral mutual recognition agreement exists between China and Japan for radio equipment.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电发射设备须依据《中华人民共和国无线电管理条例》（2016年修订），通过工业和信息化部（工信部）管理的国家无线电管理局（SRRC）取得型号核准。Wi-Fi及蓝牙设备须在华销售前取得SRRC认证，并在产品上标注CMIIT ID。联网物联网终端设备可能还须另行取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。SRRC认证仅限中国境内适用，不被日本总务省认可；中日两国之间就无线电设备不存在双边互认协议。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電發射設備須依據《中華人民共和國無線電管理條例》（2016年修訂），通過工業和信息化部（工信部）管理的國家無線電管理局（SRRC）取得型號核准。Wi-Fi及藍牙設備須在華銷售前取得SRRC認證，並在產品上標注CMIIT ID。聯網物聯網終端設備可能還須另行取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。SRRC認證僅限中國境內適用，不被日本總務省承認；中日兩國之間就無線電設備不存在雙邊互認協議。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China (2016) — SRRC type approval administered by MIIT
CMIIT ID marking requirement for wireless products sold in China (MIIT)
MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for networked terminal equipment (where applicable)

gap.en: China SRRC approval does not satisfy Japan's Giteki requirement — entirely separate certification via TELEC (or another MIC-designated body) is required before importation or sale. Key gap points: (1) Japan Radio Law mandates device-specific Giteki certification obtained prior to import; (2) the Giteki mark must appear on the device label or be accessible by electronic means; (3) 5 GHz W53 and W56 bands carry Japan-specific outdoor-use prohibitions and mandatory DFS not covered by China SRRC approval scope; (4) foreign manufacturers must designate a Japan-registered in-country agent (see wirjp-importation-agent); (5) products using radio modules already Giteki-certified may reduce re-testing scope but host device integration verification is still required to confirm the module's certified conditions are met in the specific product. CE, FCC, and SRRC authorisations provide no regulatory equivalence for Giteki.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC认证不满足日本技适要求——须通过TELEC（或其他总务省指定机构）单独完成认证，方可进口或销售。主要差距：（1）日本《电波法》要求在进口前取得设备级技适认证；（2）技适标志须显示于设备标签或可通过电子方式访问；（3）5 GHz W53和W56频段有日本特定户外禁用规定及强制DFS要求，中国SRRC认证范围未予涵盖；（4）境外制造商须指定日本境内注册代理人（见wirjp-importation-agent条目）；（5）使用已取得日本技适认证的无线模块可缩小重新测试范围，但仍须进行整机集成验证以确认模块认证条件在具体产品中得到满足。CE、FCC及SRRC授权对技适不具监管等效性。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC認證不滿足日本技適要求——須通過TELEC（或其他總務省指定機構）單獨完成認證，方可進口或銷售。主要差距：（1）日本《電波法》要求在進口前取得設備級技適認證；（2）技適標誌須顯示於設備標籤或可通過電子方式存取；（3）5 GHz W53和W56頻段有日本特定戶外禁用規定及強制DFS要求，中國SRRC認證範圍未予涵蓋；（4）境外製造商須指定日本境內登錄代理人（見wirjp-importation-agent條目）；（5）使用已取得日本技適認證的無線模組可縮小重新測試範圍，但仍須進行整機集成驗證以確認模組認證條件在具體產品中得到滿足。CE、FCC及SRRC授權對技適不具監管等效性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Giteki certification (技術基準適合証明 or 型式指定) required under Japan Radio Law Article 38-24 before importation or sale of any RF-equipped device in Japan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval required before sale in China for all radio transmitting equipment under MIIT Radio Regulations (2016)

source.publisher: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (MIC), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Giteki certification via TELEC or another MIC-designated body is mandatory for all RF-equipped devices before import or sale in Japan. China SRRC type approval and CCC certification provide no regulatory equivalence with Giteki. The device label must display the Giteki mark. Japan-specific 5 GHz W53/W56 outdoor restrictions and DFS requirements must be addressed in the Giteki test scope. A Japan-registered in-country agent is separately required for foreign manufacturers.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有射频设备在日本进口或销售前，须强制通过TELEC或其他总务省指定机构取得技适认证。中国SRRC型号核准和CCC认证对技适不具监管等效性。设备标签须标注技适标志。日本特定的5 GHz W53/W56户外限制及DFS要求须纳入技适测试范围。境外制造商另须单独指定日本境内注册代理人。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有射頻設備在日本進口或銷售前，須強制通過TELEC或其他總務省指定機構取得技適認證。中國SRRC型號核准和CCC認證對技適不具監管等效性。設備標籤須標注技適標誌。日本特定的5 GHz W53/W56戶外限制及DFS要求須納入技適測試範圍。境外製造商另須單獨指定日本境內登錄代理人。
